skyisland_intro.speaker: Lumi
skyisland_intro.text: The sky island is quiet. Too quiet.

lumi_event.speaker: Lumi
lumi_event.text: I can feel a current moving under the clouds.

boss_intro.text: A distant pressure gathers near the observatory.

exit_portal.speaker: Lumi
exit_portal.text: This portal should take us onward.
